Product.title: Product
Product.description: An ecommerce product item representing stock and pricing.

id.description: The unique ID for the product.

stockQuantity.description: Current pieces of product in inventory.

buyingPrice.description: Wholesale buying cost of product, for accounting profit margins.

sellingPrice.description: Target resale retail price of product before discounts.

imageUrl.description: Unsplash or Firebase Storage public URL of product photo.

Category.title: Category
Category.description: A classification tier for products, e.g., Face Care.

name.description: The visual display label for filtering.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: A customer transaction record representing purchased basket items and fulfillment details.

mobileNumber.description: Mobile number for delivery agent contact.

subtotal.description: Aggregate price of items before shipping charge.

ChatSession.title: ChatSession
ChatSession.description: A conversational messaging session between customer and admin.

id.description: Unique customer session ID cookie/local identifier.

messages.description: Chronological history of chat logs between standard sender and admin.

products.description: Full directory of active makeup, cosmetic, and beauty products.

categories.description: All system categories shown in the customer shop filters.

orders.description: Customer checkout records for courier shipping and accounting ledgers.

chats.description: Live messaging sessions between customers and administration.
